info.name: PAY-4077 Merchant Provisioning STAGE
info.description:
STAGE QA helper for PAY-4077.

Order:
1. Authenticate
2. Create SubMerchant
3. Retrieve SubMerchant

Base URL and auth credentials are hardcoded for STAGE. Token and wellfit-submerchant-id are saved as collection variables.

request.description: STAGE MP authenticate. Hardcoded username/password and STAGE base URL.

exec: // also set request-scoped vars (more reliable than collection alone)

body.raw:
{
  "LegalEntity": {
    "Name": "{{qaLegalEntityName}}",
    "DoingBusinessAs": "{{qaDbaName}}",
    "Type": "LIMITED_LIABILITY_COMPANY",
    "OwnershipType": "PRIVATE",
    "TaxId": "{{randomTaxId}}",
    "AnnualCreditCardSalesVolume": 500000,
    "HasAcceptedCreditCards": true,
    "YearsInBusiness": 5,
    "Address": {
      "StreetAddress1": "800 Address St",
      "StreetAddress2": "Apartment 800",
      "City": "Boston",
      "State": "MA",
      "PostalCode": "01970"
    },
    "Phone": "7817659800",
    "Principals": [
      {
        "Title": "owner1",
        "Ssn": "{{randomSsn}}",
        "DateOfBirth": "1980-10-12",
        "StakePercent": 51,
        "Order": 0,
        "FirstName": "p first",
        "LastName": "p last",
        "Address": {
          "StreetAddress1": "711 Princ 01 St",
          "StreetAddress2": "Apartment 711",
          "City": "Wylie",
          "State": "TX",
          "PostalCode": "01811"
        },
        "Phone": "7817659800",
        "Email": "{{qaOwnerEmail1}}"
      },
      {
        "Title": "owner2",
        "Ssn": "{{randomSsn2}}",
        "DateOfBirth": "1980-10-12",
        "StakePercent": 49,
        "Order": 0,
        "FirstName": "p first 2",
        "LastName": "p last 2",
        "Address": {
          "StreetAddress1": "711 Princ 01 St 2",
          "StreetAddress2": "Apartment 711",
          "City": "Wylie",
          "State": "TX",
          "PostalCode": "01811"
        },
        "Phone": "7817659800",
        "Email": "{{qaOwnerEmail2}}"
      }
    ]
  },
  "SubMerchant": {
    "Name": "{{qaMerchantName}}",
    "Url": "https://example.com/pay4077",
    "BankRoutingNumber": "211370545",
    "BankAccountNumber": "84012312415",
    "BankAccountType": "Checking",
    "PspMerchantId": "{{randomPspMerchantId}}",
    "PspMerchantIdOverride": "{{pspMerchantIdOverride}}",
    "BillingDescriptor": "PDS*PAY4077",
    "MerchantCategoryCode": "8021",
    "MerchantCategoryDetail": "8021 Detail",
    "MaxTransactionAmount": 5000,
    "IsRevenueBoostEnabled": false,
    "ECheck": {
      "BillingDescription": "PAY4077",
      "CompanyName": "PAY4077",
      "Enabled": true
    },
    "Address": {
      "StreetAddress1": "811 PrimaryContact St",
      "StreetAddress2": "Apartment 811",
      "City": "Carpenter",
      "State": "TX",
      "PostalCode": "01811"
    },
    "Phone": "7817652345",
    "PrimaryContact": {
      "FirstName": "pc first",
      "LastName": "pc last",
      "Address": null,
      "Phone": "7817653456",
      "Email": "{{qaPcEmail}}"
    },
    "OrganizationId": "5068093d-aa1f-41f8-ac42-1fc85a92b766",
    "SubMerchantEnabled": true,
    "FundingEnabled": true,
    "AccountState": 2
  },
  "SubMerchantAccounts": [
    { "PaymentProcessor": 0, "AccountState": 2 },
    { "PaymentProcessor": 1, "AccountState": 2 },
    { "PaymentProcessor": 3, "AccountState": 2 }
  ]
}

request.description: Creates a fresh SubMerchant. Random unique fields each run. Saves wellfit-submerchant-id.
Retrieve after create, or after SQL ProcessorReference corruption.
